properties.name: coco.audit.enabled
properties.description: Whether Coco audit infrastructure is enabled.

properties.name: coco.audit.failure-policy
properties.description: How Coco handles a recorder failure while publishing an audit event.

properties.name: coco.audit.logging.enabled
properties.description: Whether Coco writes audit events through the default logging recorder.

properties.name: coco.audit.logging.logger-name
properties.description: SLF4J logger name used by the default Coco audit logging recorder.

properties.name: coco.audit.logging.level
properties.description: Log level used by the default Coco audit logging recorder.

properties.name: coco.audit.access-log.enabled
properties.description: Whether Coco converts access log events to audit events.

values.description: Ignore the failed recorder and continue publishing to remaining recorders.
Disable output from the default Coco audit logging recorder.
Write default Coco audit records at ERROR level.
Write default Coco audit records at WARN level.
Write default Coco audit records at INFO level.
Write default Coco audit records at DEBUG level.
Write default Coco audit records at TRACE level.
